---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command '...'
2. Enter data '...'
3. Observe error '...'

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Error Messages

```
Paste any error messages or stack traces here
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Passkeeper Version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- Rust Version: [e.g., 1.75.0]
- Installation Method: [e.g., cargo install, from source, Docker]

## Vault Information (if applicable)

- Vault size: [e.g., 50 credentials]
- Encryption method: [e.g., AES-256-GCM]
- Authentication mode: [e.g., password only, 2FA]

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (logs, screenshots, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I am using the latest version of Passkeeper
- [ ] I have included all relevant information above
- [ ] I have removed any sensitive information from this report
